summary: Frontend-only testing of currency dropdown filter feature across all admin data table columns with number-range filter type. All 10 test scenarios verified. Admin panel loads without compile errors (Tabs import fix confirmed working).
test_credentials: Partner code: automate-accounts | Admin: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Currency dropdown in number-range filter popovers is fully working across all 6 tabs: Products (Price), Subscriptions (Amount+Tax), PartnerSubscriptions (Amount), PartnerOrders (Amount), Resources (Price). ColHeader.tsx currencyOptions prop renders a native <select> with 'Any currency' as default and 7 currency options (AUD, CAD, EUR, GBP, INR, MXN, USD) from useSupportedCurrencies hook. hasFilter flag correctly detects currency selection and shows blue dot. Clear button resets priceRange/amountRange/taxRange to {} removing currency. Admin.tsx Tabs import on line 41 is present and working - no compile errors.
